attacking_style: Operates from breakaways rather than peloton attacks, capable of solo moves on final climbs of lumpy stages. Shows patience to time secondary attacks from reduced groups.
team_tactics: Utilized in attrition/stringing-out roles for team goals when not hunting own opportunities. When given freedom, targets breakaway scenarios requiring sustained TT power rather than explosive accelerations.
terrain_preference: Lumpy stages with manageable climbs favoring time trial power over pure climbing. Excels in time trials and solo efforts where pacing strategy matters more than explosive acceleration.
vulnerability: Pure sprint finishes offer limited opportunities. Likely struggles on high-mountain stages with steep gradients and repeated accelerations where TT power becomes less relevant.
key_patterns: Breakaway specialist: multiple observations of operating from early moves, not late-race peloton attacks
Secondary attack strategy: won by attacking again from reduced breakaway, not initial move
Time trial pacing expertise: held TT hot seat two hours, won via sustained power
form_trajectory: neutral: Last observation from 2022 shows domestique duty rather than personal ambitions, suggesting role shift from 2020 contract-year success
